title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 306.430 - Liens and encumbrances incurred before July 1, 2003 — how terminated, completed and enforced
text:
306.430.  Liens and encumbrances incurred before July 1, 2003 — how terminated, completed and enforced. — All transactions involving liens or encumbrances on outboard motors, motorboats, vessels, or watercraft entered into before July 1, 2003, and the rights, duties, and interests flowing from such transactions shall remain valid after July 1, 2003, and may be terminated, completed, consummated, or enforced as required or permitted by any statute or other law amended or repealed by sections 306.400 to 306.430 as though such repeal or amendment had not occurred.
(L. 1985 H.B. 280, et al. § 301.730, A.L. 2002 H.B. 2008 merged with S.B. 895) 
Effective 8-28-02 (H.B. 2008); 7-01-03 (S.B. 895)
